title: ANC - changes are present after restarting the app
scenario: ANC setting does not persist after restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and connect to the Poly Bluetooth audio device.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → ANC.
3. Set ANC to a specific value (e.g., High, Low, or a custom level).
4. Fully close (kill) the Poly Studio Mobile app.
5. Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app and reconnect to the device.
6. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → ANC.
expected: The ANC setting value remains the same as set in step 3.
